mapper.select: SELECT S.NAME, S.STATUS, S.DETAIL_NAME, S.SEQ, S.IDX FROM PI_SETTING S WHERE TYPE = #{type} ORDER BY SEQ
SELECT CONCAT(CN.FLAG,'_',CN.IDX) AS STATUS, CN.NAME FROM PI_CUSTOM_NAME CN WHERE CN.FLAG ='approval' AND CN.ADD_DATA = 'Y'
SELECT CONCAT(CN.FLAG,'_',CN.IDX) AS STATUS, CN.NAME FROM PI_CUSTOM_NAME CN WHERE CN.FLAG ='approval'

SELECT 'teamStaus' AS sType, COUNT(idx) AS cnt FROM pi_setting WHERE NAME ='group_approval_mngr' AND STATUS = 'Y' UNION ALL SELECT 'userLIst' AS sType, COUNT(idx) AS cnt FROM pi_setting_data sd WHERE sd.name = 'approval_group' AND sd.`status` != 'N' AND sd.`status` = #{insa_code}

SELECT CP.PATTERN_CODE, CP.PATTERN_IDX, CP.PATTERN_CNT, CP.PATTERN_EN_NAME, CP.PATTERN_KR_NAME, CP.COLOR_CODE, CP.MASK_CNT, CP.MASK_CHK, CP.MASK_TYPE, CP.PATTERN_RULE, CP.PATTERN_UPDATED FROM PI_CUSTOM_PATTERN CP ORDER BY CP.PATTERN_CNT
SELECT IDX, NAME, STATUS, DAY, TIME, COM, PWD FROM PI_SETTING_DATA WHERE STATUS != 'N' AND NAME = 'mail'

SELECT HI.RETRUN_URL, HI.HEADER_NO, IF(HI.SUB_NO = 0, CONCAT('[', HI.HEADER_NAME, ']' ), CONCAT('[', (SELECT D.HEADER_NAME FROM PI_HEADER_INFORMATION D WHERE D.SUB_NO = 0 AND D.HEADER_NO = HI.HEADER_NO) , ' > ', HI.HEADER_NAME, ']') ) AS HEADER_NAME FROM PI_HEADER_INFORMATION HI, PI_GRADE_HEADER GH WHERE HI.IDX = GH.HEADER_IDX AND HI.URL = #{requestUrl} AND GH.GRADE_NO = ${userGrade}
mapper.update: UPDATE pi_custom_pattern SET PATTERN_CODE = #{patternReconNm}, PATTERN_RULE = #{patternRuleTd}, PATTERN_EN_NAME = #{patternNameEr}, PATTERN_KR_NAME = #{patternNameKr}, CREUSER_NO = #{user_no}, COLOR_CODE = #{patternColor}, MASK_CNT = #{patternMaskCnt}, MASK_TYPE = #{patternMaskType}, MASK_CHK = #{patternMaskChk}, regdate = NOW() WHERE PATTERN_IDX = #{patternIDX}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM pi_custom_pattern WHERE PATTERN_UPDATED = 'Y' AND PATTERN_IDX = #{patternIDX}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pi_custom_pattern (PATTERN_CODE, PATTERN_RULE, PATTERN_EN_NAME, PATTERN_KR_NAME, PATTERN_UPDATED, CREUSER_NO, COLOR_CODE, MASK_CNT, MASK_TYPE, MASK_CHK, regdate ) VALUES (#{patternReconNm}, #{patternRuleTd}, #{patternNameEr}, #{patternNameKr}, 'Y', #{user_no}, #{patternColor}, #{patternMaskCnt}, #{patternMaskType}, #{patternMaskChk}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT TF.IDX, TF.NAME, TF.DELETE_TYPE , TF.ADD_DATA FROM PI_CUSTOM_NAME TF WHERE TF.FLAG = #{value}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM PI_CUSTOM_NAME WHERE IDX = #{idx} AND FLAG = #{status} AND PI_CUSTOM_NAME.DELETE_TYPE = 'Y'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PI_CUSTOM_NAME (NAME, ADD_DATA, FLAG) VALUES (#{name} , 'Y', #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT T.IDX, T.NAME, T.CON, T.FLAG, SF.NAME AS FLAG_CON, T.USER_NO , T.FLAG_CON AS FLAG_STATUS FROM PI_TEMPLATE T LEFT OUTER JOIN PI_SETTING_FLAG SF ON T.FLAG_CON = SF.FLAG WHERE T.FLAG = 'Y'
SELECT u.user_no, u.user_name, u.jikwee, u.jikguk , sd.status as insa_code FROM pi_user u, pi_setting_data sd WHERE u.user_no = sd.user_no AND sd.name = 'approval_group' AND sd.status = #{value}

SELECT CU.NAME, SD.USER_NO, SD.STATUS, U.JIKWEE, SD.COM, U.USER_NAME, SD.IDX, U.USER_EMAIL, U.JIKGUK FROM PI_SETTING_DATA SD LEFT OUTER JOIN PI_CUSTOM_NAME CU ON CONCAT(CU.FLAG,'_',CU.IDX) = SD.STATUS LEFT OUTER JOIN PI_USER U ON SD.USER_NO = U.USER_NO LEFT OUTER JOIN PI_GROUP G ON U.INSA_CODE = G.INSA_CODE WHERE SD.NAME = 'approval' AND SD.STATUS != 'N' ORDER BY CU.flag_cnt

SELECT CU.NAME, SD.USER_NO, SD.STATUS, U.JIKWEE, SD.COM, U.USER_NAME, SD.IDX, U.USER_EMAIL FROM PI_SETTING_DATA SD LEFT OUTER JOIN PI_CUSTOM_NAME CU ON CONCAT(CU.FLAG,'_',CU.IDX) = SD.STATUS LEFT OUTER JOIN PI_USER U ON SD.USER_NO = U.USER_NO LEFT OUTER JOIN PI_GROUP G ON U.INSA_CODE = G.INSA_CODE WHERE SD.NAME = 'approval' AND SD.STATUS != 'N' ORDER BY SD.STATUS DESC

SELECT DPF.PROCESSING_FLAG, DPF.PROCESSING_FLAG_NAME, DPF.DATE_ENABLE, DPF.COMMENT_ENABLE, DPF.COMMENT_TITLE, DPF.COMMENT_TEXT, DPF.BOTTOM_TEXT, DPF.ENABLE, (CASE WHEN DPF.TYPE=1 THEN '(정탐) ' WHEN DPF.TYPE=0 THEN '(오탐) ' WHEN DPF.TYPE=2 THEN '(경로예외) ' ELSE '' END) AS APRROVAL_TYPE FROM PI_DATA_PROCESSING_FLAG DPF WHERE 1 = 1
AND DPF.TYPE = #{type}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM pi_data_processing_flag WHERE processing_flag = #{processing_flag} AND TYPE = #{type}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pi_data_processing_flag (TYPE , PROCESSING_FLAG_NAME , DATE_ENABLE , COMMENT_ENABLE , COMMENT_TITLE, COMMENT_TEXT) VALUES (#{type},#{processing_flag_name},#{date_enable},#{comment_enable},#{comment_title},#{comment_text})
mapper.select: SELECT PATH_EX_FLAG, PATH_EX_FLAG_NAME, ENABLE FROM pi_path_exception_flag WHERE ENABLE = '1'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PI_SETTING_DATA (NAME, USER_NO, STATUS, DAY, TIME, COM, PWD) VALUES (#{name}, #{userNo}, #{status}, #{day}, #{time}, #{email}, #{pwd})
mapper.select: SELECT IDX, NAME FROM PI_DB_BACKUP ORDER BY IDX DESC
SELECT SESSION_TIME FROM PI_VERSION
SELECT RH.type ,RH.header_name, RH.header_type FROM pi_setting S, pi_report_header RH WHERE S.`type` = 3 AND S.name LIKE CONCAT(#{report_flag}, '%') AND S.IDX = RH.`type` ORDER BY RH.IDX
SELECT G.insa_code, G.team_name, COUNT(S.user_no) AS user_cnt, G.fullname FROM pi_group G LEFT OUTER JOIN pi_setting_data S ON S.status = G.insa_code AND S.status != 'N' GROUP BY G.insa_code
